title: Analytics and Archive Tests

tasks.description: Create AnalyticsManager tests - Test getGraphStats (count entities, count relations, count by type, calculate averages), validateGraph (orphan relations, duplicate entities, invalid references, validation report), and metrics (density, connectivity, identify hubs)
testCategories: getGraphStats (count entities, count relations, count by type, calculate averages)
validateGraph (orphan relations, duplicate entities, invalid references, validation report)

tasks.description: Create ArchiveManager tests - Test archiveEntities (by age, by importance, by tags, dry run support), archive criteria (combine multiple, empty result handling), and archive result (report count, list archived)
testCategories: archiveEntities (by age, by importance, by tags, dry run)
Archive Criteria (combine multiple, empty result handling)
Archive Result (report count, list archived entities)

tasks.description: Create SearchFilterChain tests - Test filter chaining (multiple filters, apply in order, short-circuit on empty), individual filters (importance range, date range, entity type, tags), and performance (optimize filter order, large datasets)
testCategories: Filter Chaining (multiple filters, apply in order, short-circuit on empty)
Individual Filters (importance range, date range, entity type, tags)

tasks.description: Create errors.test.ts tests - Test all error classes: EntityNotFoundError (include entity name, correct error code, instanceof KnowledgeGraphError), RelationNotFoundError (include from/to/type, format message), ValidationError (include details, support multiple), CycleDetectedError (include cycle path), and error inheritance (all extend KnowledgeGraphError, catchable by base class)
testCategories: EntityNotFoundError (entity name, error code, instanceof KnowledgeGraphError)
Error Inheritance (all extend KnowledgeGraphError, catchable by base)

notes: This final sprint covers read-only operations (analytics, validation) and utility classes (errors, filters). These have lower risk as they don't modify data. After this sprint, overall coverage should exceed 90%.
